title: Girl in the Street
writer: Ray Lewis, Florence Tranter, Monckton Hoffe
actors: Anna Neagle, Tullio Carminati, Robert Douglas
plot: Jacqueline, a London gutter-snipe is "befriended" by Marius Andreani, a diplomat known for being a rounder with the ladies, but he goes pure with Jacqueline, resolved to help her to the heights of Terpsichore, for which she has a ...
